void.string: <process description="templateId=route-conditional-parallel-long-field-template&lbpmTmpId=route-conditional-parallel-long-field-lbpm" fdId="route-conditional-parallel-long-field-process"> <nodes> <startNode id="QX10" name="Start"/> <splitNode id="QX20" name="Conditional fan-out" splitType="condition" relatedNodeIds="QX50"/> <reviewNode id="QX31" name="Alpha review" handlerIds="variant-alpha-reviewer" handlerNames="Alpha Reviewer" handlerSelectType="org"/> <reviewNode id="QX32" name="Gamma review" handlerIds="variant-gamma-reviewer" handlerNames="Gamma Reviewer" handlerSelectType="org"/> <joinNode id="QX50" name="Conditional join" joinType="all" relatedNodeIds="QX20"/> <endNode id="QX90" name="End"/> </nodes> <lines> <line id="QE10" startNodeId="QX10" endNodeId="QX20"/> <line id="QE21" startNodeId="QX20" endNodeId="QX31" condition="$fd_route_selection_structural_variant$.equals("A") || $fd_route_selection_structural_variant$ == "B"" disCondition="$Route selection$ is Alpha or Beta"/> <line id="QE22" startNodeId="QX20" endNodeId="QX32" condition="$fd_route_selection_structural_variant$.equals("C")" disCondition="$Route selection$ is Gamma"/> <line id="QE31" startNodeId="QX31" endNodeId="QX50"/> <line id="QE32" startNodeId="QX32" endNodeId="QX50"/> <line id="QE50" startNodeId="QX50" endNodeId="QX90"/> </lines> </process>
